subject: Your fuel spend has a 15% efficiency gap — here's where it hides
body:
Hi [Name],

Fuel is typically 30–35% of total fleet operating costs. Most logistics CFOs benchmark against industry averages — but the real comparison should be against route-optimized operations.

The average unoptimized fleet runs 12–18% more kilometers than necessary due to static routing and empty return legs.

[Product] closes that gap through dynamic routing and load matching. One client reduced fuel spend by $180,000 annually on a 60-vehicle fleet.

I can model the savings estimate for your fleet size — interested?
why_it_works: data-driven CFO framing — cost percentage + specific gap + dollar-denominated result
